languages.text: "Вы всерьез считаете, что я вот так просто вам доверю секретные данные?"

traits.locale_text: "Вы всерьез считаете, что я вот так просто вам доверю секретные данные?"

languages.text: "Do you seriously believe that I would trust you with sensitive information just like that?"
languages.original_text: "Вы всерьез считаете, что я вот так просто вам доверю секретные данные?"

traits.locale_text: "Do you seriously believe that I would trust you with sensitive information just like that?"
"Do you seriously believe that I would trust you with sensitive information just like that?"
"Do you seriously believe that I would trust you with sensitive information just like that?"

languages.text: “你真以为我会就这么把机密情报告诉你？”
languages.original_text: "Do you seriously believe that I would trust you with sensitive information just like that?"

traits.locale_text: “你真以为我会就这么把机密情报告诉你？”

languages.text: « Vous croyez vraiment que je serais prête à vous confier une information aussi sensible sur votre seule bonne mine ? »
languages.original_text: "Do you seriously believe that I would trust you with sensitive information just like that?"

traits.locale_text: « Vous croyez vraiment que je serais prête à vous confier une information aussi sensible sur votre seule bonne mine ? »

languages.text: "Bu denli hassas bir bilgiyi size öylece vereceğimi mi sanıyorsunuz gerçekten?"
languages.original_text: "Do you seriously believe that I would trust you with sensitive information just like that?"

traits.locale_text: "Bu denli hassas bir bilgiyi size öylece vereceğimi mi sanıyorsunuz gerçekten?"

languages.text: «¿De verdad cree que le confiaría información tan importante sin más?».
languages.original_text: "Do you seriously believe that I would trust you with sensitive information just like that?"

traits.locale_text: «¿De verdad cree que le confiaría información tan importante sin más?».

languages.text: "Glaubt Ihr ernsthaft, ich würde Euch derart sensible Informationen anvertrauen?"
languages.original_text: "Do you seriously believe that I would trust you with sensitive information just like that?"

traits.locale_text: "Glaubt Ihr ernsthaft, ich würde Euch derart sensible Informationen anvertrauen?"

languages.text: 「そんな簡単に、私、機密情報をあなたに託すなんて、本当に信じているの？」
languages.original_text: "Do you seriously believe that I would trust you with sensitive information just like that?"

traits.locale_text: 「そんな簡単に、私、機密情報をあなたに託すなんて、本当に信じているの？」
